benefits.description: Noticed appetite suppression at 2mg; eats half as much as before, no food noise, no constant chasing highs, no sugar rushes or binging
Dopamine-chasing in general is down, which has helped regulate emotions better

side_effects.description: Feels full all the time; food moves slower; pooping takes much longer
Burping is a consistent side effect; at too high a dose, burps feel like heartburn with possible vomiting
Libido is down; less interested in sex
Cannot drink alcohol without feeling awful all day with stomach-aches and low energy

protocol_notes: Started at 0.5mg x2 for first two doses (1mg/week), then increased to 2mg, then 3mg by week 6. Notes that Reta has effects lasting about 5 days for him. Emphasizes importance of high protein intake (~200g for his size).
